description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized shotgun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent suppressor or extended muzzle at the front. The body is angular and dark, with a squared receiver and a vertical foregrip beneath the barrel for added control. The stock is skeletal and minimalist, featuring a rectangular cutout, and the pistol grip is textured for a secure hold. The trigger guard is squared and robust, enclosing a simple trigger. The overall design is utilitarian and tactical, with a matte black finish and no visible decorative elements.
description: A blocky, matte black shotgun with a long barrel, vertical foregrip, and minimalist skeletal stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long barrel, vertical foregrip, and skeletal stock.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same visible features: barrel, foregrip, and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open skeletal stock and the narrow width of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, robust trigger guard with a simple, angular profile and no finger grooves
